main_word.definition: A building that people, usually one family, live in.
main_word.example: They are living in a big house with a garden.

sub_words.clue_for_game: A person who lives near you.

details.full_definition: A person who lives next to or near you.

sub_words.clue_for_game: Used to help you see better.

details.full_definition: Two lenses in a frame that rests on the nose and ears.

main_word.definition: A piece of furniture with a flat top and legs.

details.full_definition: A set of steps leading from one floor to another.

main_word.example: The child is playing in the garden.

details.full_definition: Plural of chair; seats for one person.

details.full_definition: A marriage ceremony and any celebrations such as a meal or a party that follow it.
details.example: I'm going to my sister's wedding.

sub_words.clue_for_game: A person you know well and like.

main_word.definition: An object used for eating or serving food.

details.full_definition: Not married or having a romantic relationship with somebody.

details.full_definition: A large piece of equipment for cooking food, containing an oven and a hob.

details.full_definition: The main meal of the day.

details.full_definition: The son of your brother or sister.

details.full_definition: A human being considered as an individual.

They live in a grand old house.
